notFound.title.message: تهت في منتصف الطريق إلى الإطلاق.
notFound.title.description: The 404 page heading set by the consumer in themeConfig.errorPages.notFound.title

notFound.description.message: هذا المسار لم يُنشر بعد — عُد إلى المشروع لمتابعة التصفّح.
notFound.description.description: The 404 page description set by the consumer in themeConfig.errorPages.notFound.description

notFound.backHomeLabel.description: The 404 page "Back to home" CTA label set by the consumer in themeConfig.errorPages.notFound.backHomeLabel

errorPageContent.title.description: The per-page crash heading set by the consumer in themeConfig.errorPages.errorPageContent.title

errorPageContent.retryLabel.description: The per-page crash retry button label set by the consumer in themeConfig.errorPages.errorPageContent.retryLabel

error.retryLabel.description: The top-level error boundary retry button label set by the consumer in themeConfig.errorPages.error.retryLabel
